violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee stated they washed hands in bathroom or dump sink. Use handwash sink only.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Pkgs of tortillas sitting on floor in storage

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw chicken and beef sitting in sink thawing. -Raw beef stored above cooked burger in 2 door upright cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Bucket at 25-50 ppm chlorine. Needs to be at 100 ppm.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -Prep cooler with sauces in dining area needs to have a sneeze guard to protect food from contamination from guests.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Beef and chicken sitting in sink. Need to thaw with cold running water or under refrigeration.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Need to use a scoop with a handle for beans.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Teflon pots and pans are scratched and need replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Inside of ice machine and ice catcher need cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers in kitchen. -Clean inside microwaves. -Clean food prep counters and cutting boards. -Clean slicer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen and dishwash area. -Clean doors and handles on all coolers.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Filters and hood surround need cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Boxes of plastic utensils sitting on floor.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sink not working.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not maintained in good repair. -Replace missing base trim in kitchen and hallway. -Finish trim on serving window ledge.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need very thorough cleaning throughout kitchen and dishwash area.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Wet cloth sitting on counter.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -Need sneeze guard for self serve condiment cooler.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -3 door prep cooler was at 44-46 on top. Adjust top trays to close air gaps to prevent refrigeration loss.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Cooked meats thawing in prep sink need to be thawed under cold running water or under refrigeration.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Dispose of all scratched teflon cooking pans.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan cover in 2 door upright fridge.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling need more thoroughly cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Appropriate procedures (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Appropriate procedures (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
